flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colorado Northwestern Community College fell 48% between 2009 and 2010 (23.2% → 12.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colorado Northwestern Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado Northwestern Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.6k → $7.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Colorado Northwestern Community College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (562 → 504).
